creator: sunpoet@sunpoet.net
text:
Hi,

Since you put the author's e-mail address in MAINTAINER,
I send this mail to make sure you'll maintain this port yourself.
If so, I'll change it to geistteufel@yahoo.fr.
Thanks

Regards,
--=20
